verses.text: A thukkik Pasian, a thukkik Pasian, Topa aw, na hehna hong lakkhia in
Tho in, leitung thukhenpa aw, a kiphasak mite tungah amau' ngah ding a kilawm gimna pia ta in
Topa aw, migilote bang tanvei lungdam ding uh a, migilote bang tanvei lungnuamin omom lai ding ahi uh hiam
Gamtatsiate bang tanvei kihisak lai ding uh a, a siat gamtatna uh bang tanvei kisialhpih lai ding ahi uh hiam
Topa aw, amaute in nangma mite sugawp uh a, nangma luahte gimsak uh hi
Amaute in meigong numeite leh khualmite thatlumin pa neilote suamlum uh hi
Amaute in, “ Topa in mulo hi; Jakob Pasian in theilo hi,” hong ci uh hi
Theitel un, mi lungsimmawl pente aw! Lung pillote aw, cik ciangin pil ding na hi uh hiam
I bil a bawlpa in khua zalo ding ahi hiam? I mit a piangsakpa in khua mulo ding ahi hiam
Minamte a thuhilhpa in mi thuhilhlo ding ahi hiam? Mihingte tungah theihtheihna a hilh Topa in mihingte' ngaihsutna thei a, amaute pen husan' bang bek ahihna teltakin a thei hi
Topa aw, migilote-a' dingin gum khat a kitawh hun mateng, haksat hun sungteng a tawlngak theihna dingin na thukham na hilh mi, na thuhilh mi, mi nuamsa ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite nusialo ding a, ama luahte paidaklo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh thutang pen thuman mite tungah hong tungkik ding a, lungsim thutang khempeuh in amah zui ding uh hi
Kei-a' dingin migilote a do dingin kua kipan ahi hiam? Kei-a' dingin siatna a bawlte' langkhatah kua ding ahi hiam
Topa in kei hong huhlo hi leh, gamkhing sungah ka tung khinta ding hi
Topa aw, “Ka khe taal,” ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin na itna kip in kei hong kaito hi
Ka lungsim ngaihsutna a tam mahmah ciangin kei na hong hehnem a, na hong lungdamsak hi
Sihna ding ngeina a bawl, a gilo gam ukte, nang tawh kipawl ding ahi hiam
Amaute in thuman mihoihte thah sawm uh a, a mawhbaanglo mite sihna thuaksak uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa pen keima munkip, keima Pasian, ka belh suangpi a suak khinta hi
Amah in amau' mawhnate amau' tung mahah tungsak kikin, a gitlohna hangun amaute a maimangsak ding hi. Topa, i Pasian in amaute maimangsak ding hi.
